query:
ALTER TABLE inventory_vehicles 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plate VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL AFTER transmission,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS doors VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL AFTER plate,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fipePrice INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER price,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS offerPrice INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER fipePrice,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS vehicleState VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL AFTER doors,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS category VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL AFTER vehicleState,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS observation TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER category;
